# Right PEQ filters
# miniDSP-style peaking filters plus normalized biquad coefficients
# Biquad convention: y[n] = b0*x[n] + b1*x[n-1] + b2*x[n-2] - a1*y[n-1] - a2*y[n-2]

Filter 1: ON PK Fc 174.683 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 1.3770
  biquad b0=1.0014359767 b1=-1.99290806642 b2=0.991602345638 a1=-1.99290806642 a2=0.993038322342
Filter 2: ON PK Fc 252.319 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 1.5854
  biquad b0=1.00179987478 b1=-1.99100260364 b2=0.989474253808 a1=-1.99100260364 a2=0.991274128591

  biquad b0=1.00048616566 b1=-1.99756192534 b2=0.997156882011 a1=-1.99756192534 a2=0.997643047673

  biquad b0=1.01375453029 b1=-1.92751943219 b2=0.919562907251 a1=-1.92751943219 a2=0.933317437543

  biquad b0=1.00051780512 b1=-1.99710387063 b2=0.996971853107 a1=-1.99710387063 a2=0.997489658223
